title: iCapture Software & IBML Hardware Maintenance & Support Renewal
name: iCapture Software & IBML Hardware Maintenance & Support
statement_of_work: The California Franchise Tax Board (FTB), is seeking to contract with a vendor to renew iCapture and Tangent software and IBML Scanner hardware maintenance and support. Last Day to Submit Final Bids is June 5, 2026, by 5:00PM Pacific Time.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the iCapture Software & IBML Hardware Maintenance & Support solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
description: The California Franchise Tax Board (FTB), is seeking to contract with a vendor to renew iCapture and Tangent software and IBML Scanner hardware maintenance and support. Last Day to Submit Final Bids is June 5, 2026, by 5:00PM Pacific Time.

unspsc_codes.description: Computer services - Computer hardware maintenance & support
